topic: NLP4PBM: process extraction from natural-language text
topic_definition: Only use title/abstract evidence. Focus on whether the paper specifically covers NLP for extracting process models or process representations from natural-language text. Defer full-text-only checks to Stage 2.

questions.question: Does the title/abstract explicitly indicate NLP for process extraction from natural-language text?
Does the observable task signal connect natural-language text to extraction or construction of a process model / process representation / decisional model?

Is there direct title/abstract evidence that the paper is actually about process redesign, matching, prediction, sentiment analysis, individual labels, or generating natural text from processes instead of process extraction?
Does the title/abstract clearly indicate that the paper is a survey, review, or other secondary research article?
If the core fit looks plausible but incomplete from title/abstract alone, note the unresolved fit and what Stage 2 should confirm.
